ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle non-ASCII character highlighting on or off.
ast.target: 切换非 ASCII 字符高亮的开或关。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, non-ASCII characters are also highlighted in reading/preview mode. Off by default since highlighting in edit mode is usually sufficient.
ast.target: 启用后，非 ASCII 字符在阅读/预览模式下也会被高亮。默认关闭，因为在编辑模式下高亮通常已足够。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Paste characters or emojis here that should NOT be highlighted. Just paste them next to each other, no separators needed. Example: e--n
ast.target: 在此处粘贴不应被高亮的字符或表情符号。只需将它们彼此粘贴在一起，无需分隔符。示例：e--n

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Override the default highlight style. Use the .non-ascii-highlight selector to customize background-color, border, padding, border-radius, etc.
ast.target: 覆盖默认的高亮样式。使用 .non-ascii-highlight 选择器来自定义背景颜色、边框、内边距、圆角等。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add a new find/replace pair to the list.
ast.target: 向列表中添加新的查找/替换对。

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 在此处粘贴允许的字符

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No matching characters found to replace.
ast.target: 未找到匹配的字符进行替换。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 自动替换非 ASCII 字符

ast.name: text
ast.source: Highlights any character outside the standard ASCII range (0x00-0x7F) in both Edit Mode (Live Preview) and Reading View. Use the allowlist to exclude specific characters from highlighting.
ast.target: 在编辑模式（实时预览）和阅读视图中高亮显示标准 ASCII 范围（0x00-0x7F）之外的任何字符。使用允许列表来排除特定字符不被高亮。

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can disable highlighting for a specific note by adding the following to its frontmatter:
ast.target: 您可以通过在笔记的 frontmatter 中添加以下内容来为特定笔记禁用高亮：

ast.name: text
ast.source: If the property is missing or set to true, highlighting remains active (as long as the global toggle above is enabled).
ast.target: 如果该属性缺失或设置为 true，高亮将保持活动状态（只要上面的全局开关已启用）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Define characters to find and replace when running the "Auto replace non-ASCII characters" command from the palette. Each rule replaces all occurrences of the "find" character with the "replace" text.
ast.target: 定义在从命令面板运行“自动替换非 ASCII 字符”命令时要查找和替换的字符。每条规则将“查找”字符的所有出现替换为“替换”文本。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Tip: paste the actual character into the field, OR enter a code point as \u202E, \u{1F600}, or U+202E. Multiple escapes/chars in the same field are allowed.
ast.target: 提示：将实际字符粘贴到字段中，或输入代码点，如 \\u202E、\\u{1F600} 或 U+202E。同一字段中允许多个转义/字符。
